rationale.quality-debt: Empirically characterizes redundant, unnecessary AI-generated methods deleted in review
rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Quantifies reviewer burden: agentic PRs shift effort onto reviewers
rationale.metrics: Deletion-likelihood score as deliverable; measurand: quality (redundancy)
rationale.routing-signal: Producer-independent predictor framed to prioritize reviewer attention; no gating operationalized
rationale.risk-quality: Empirical results: deletion rates and redundancy characteristics of AI methods
